name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: HyperStack Pipe
notes: This building block detects when HyperStack pipe name is discovered.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: HyperStack Pipe on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001837) PipeEvent (Pipe Connected), (5001836) PipeEvent (Pipe Created)
when the event matches Pipe Name (custom) is any of suplexrpc
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: HyperStack Pipe on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001837) PipeEvent (Pipe Connected), (5001836) PipeEvent (Pipe Created)
AND when the event matches Pipe Name (custom) is any of suplexrpc
